features.name: base_plate
features.description: 3mm-thick rectangular slab for bed adhesion, spans from -2 to 59mm in X and Y

features.name: chord_wall_x
features.description: 2mm-thick flat wall closing the angle=0 (Y-negative) cut face of the arc sector

features.name: chord_wall_y
features.description: 2mm-thick flat wall closing the angle=90 (X-negative) cut face of the arc sector

features.name: spigot_base_fill
features.description: Solid quarter-cylinder fill bridging from base plate top (z=3) to spigot start (z=5) at spigot OD

features.name: spigot_wall
features.description: 90-degree arc of spigot at OD 106mm, wall thickness 5mm (OD 53r, ID 48r), plain zone below ridge

features.name: lower_stop_ridge
features.description: Ridge OD 114mm with 45-degree underside chamfer (z=20-24) and 1mm flat top (z=24-25). Prevents duct wire ring from sliding past.

features.name: foam_groove
features.description: 2.5mm-deep annular recess in spigot OD for 3/4-inch closed-cell EPDM foam tape. OD at groove floor = 101mm, width 19mm axial.

features.name: above_seal_grip
features.description: Plain spigot wall at full OD 106mm above the foam groove, provides grip zone for zip tie clamping

features.name: lead_in_taper
features.description: Conical taper from OD 106mm down to 100mm over 8mm height. Tip wall thickness 2.0mm. Guides duct onto spigot.

features.name: internal_fin
features.description: Single radial fin at 45 degrees (arc midpoint), 2mm thick, 6mm radial depth, with 10mm taper zone at top. Overlaps 1mm into spigot wall.

features.name: center_bore
features.description: Hollow bore at ID 96mm through entire part height (subtracted from spigot wall)

specDeviations.reason: XY extent is ridge_r (57) + 2*chord_wall (4) = 61mm. The spec target of 62 assumed approximate rounding; actual geometry is 61mm, within the 2mm default tolerance.
Same as X -- symmetric quarter arc geometry.
